statement.en: Every reasoning operation in Rei-AIOS is expressible in D-FUMT₈, and every D-FUMT₈ value has a canonical interpretation applicable across domains (arithmetic, logic, physics, philosophy). Conjectured: D-FUMT₈ is the minimal complete set of truth values for paraconsistent + modal + intuitionistic + quantum + self-referential reasoning combined.

reiTyping.rationale: D-FUMT₈ 八値論理: TRUE/FALSE/BOTH/NEITHER/INFINITY/ZERO/FLOWING/SELF as a canonical eight-valued extension of classical Boolean logic, unified across all Rei-AIOS modules as a shared reasoning substrate (STEP 406).

formalization.notes: Foundational framework; formal verification scope per-component
